qual: has_role(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), 'admin'::app_role)

with_check: (has_role(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), 'admin'::app_role) OR (( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid) = user_id))

policyname: Users can update profiles based on permissions
qual: can_manage_user(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), user_id)
with_check: can_manage_user(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), user_id)

policyname: Enable read access for authenticated users

qual:
(tenant_id IN ( SELECT profiles.tenant_id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.system_role <> ALL (ARRAY['guest'::text, 'vendor'::text])))))
